MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT AHMAD A. SENAN'S MOTION TO TRANSFER THE ACTION TO THE PROPER COURT (COUNTY OF SAN MATEO).

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted.
